summary.key_theme: 華爾街分析師普遍看好 Southern Company 的融資能力與電力需求前景，紛紛調升目標價與評級。

bullish.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Southern, Raises Price Target to $112
bullish.reason: TD Cowen 分析師 Shelby Tucker 將目標價從 108 美元調升至 112 美元，並維持買入評級，主要基於公司強勁的融資能力與電力需求展望。

bullish.title: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Southern to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $111
bullish.reason: Evercore ISI 分析師 Nicholas Amicucci 將評級從「與大盤持平」調升至「優於大盤」，並調升目標價，顯示市場對其成長潛力信心增強。

bullish.title: Southern Company (SO) Price Target Raised by TD Cowen on Financing and Demand Outlook
bullish.reason: 該報導指出 Southern Company 有望成為「股息貴族」之一，結合強勁的電力需求基本面，進一步強化了長期投資價值。

bullish.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Southern (SO) Analyst Upgrades And A Key Leadership Appointment
bullish.reason: Mississippi Power 任命 Fredie Carmichael 為副總裁，此類管理層變動通常被視為營運穩定與策略延續的正面訊號。

bullish.title: Keybanc Upgrades Southern (SO)
bullish.reason: Keybanc 的評級調升進一步鞏固了市場對該公司近期股價表現的正面共識。

bullish.title: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Southern (SO)
bullish.reason: 此為 Evercore ISI 評級變動的重複報導，確認了前述分析師觀點的市場影響力。

neutral.title: Is Southern (SO) Still Attractively Priced After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
neutral.reason: 文章探討在股價經歷多年強勁上漲後，目前的估值是否仍具吸引力，屬於中性的投資價值評估。

neutral.title: Southern Stock: A Deep Dive Into Analyst Perspectives (13 Ratings)
neutral.reason: 彙整了 13 位分析師的綜合觀點，提供投資人客觀的市場共識數據，無明顯偏向。
